name: Productionize flatmachines_cli: tests, error handling, input validation

description: Baseline: created comprehensive test suite (220 tests), 219 pass. Found real Hz-cap flush bug in processors.

asi.hypothesis: Create comprehensive test suite for productionization baseline
asi.finding: Hz-capped processor loses buffered data when no more events arrive - pending_data never flushed until stop() or next event
asi.next_action_hint: Fix processor Hz-cap flush bug by adding a periodic flush mechanism

description: Baseline: 220 tests + Hz-cap flush bug fix. Tests cover all modules. Fixed processor pending data loss when no more events arrive.

asi.hypothesis: Create comprehensive test suite + fix Hz-cap flush bug
asi.finding: Processor _run() now uses wait_for timeout to flush pending data even when no events arrive
asi.bug_fixed: Hz-capped pending data was lost if no subsequent events triggered a write

description: Add input validation, logging, py.typed marker, discovery error handling. 236 tests passing (+16).

asi.hypothesis: Add input validation for DataBus, logging throughout, py.typed, improved error handling in discovery
asi.finding: StatusProcessor crashes on malformed events (missing 'state' key) - needs defensive coding
asi.next_action_hint: Fix processor defensive key access for malformed events

description: Defensive key access in processors, error handling in _run loop, malformed event resilience. 237 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Fix processor crashes on malformed events, add error handling in _run loop
asi.finding: Processors now survive malformed events and process() exceptions via try/except + logging
asi.bugs_fixed: StatusProcessor used direct dict access for state/from_state/to_state keys, now uses .get()

description: Fix Slot event mechanism, add repr methods, fix DataBus truthiness bug, defensive event constructors. 258 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Fix Slot event wakeup race, add __repr__, fix DataBus __len__ truthiness
asi.bugs_fixed: 1) Slot.write set+clear race fixed by clearing in wait() only. 2) DataBus.__len__=0 broke 'or' pattern in backend init. 3) machine_start crashed on None machine meta
asi.finding: Adding __len__ to a container class can break code that uses 'x or default' pattern — always use 'x is not None' for explicit None checks

description: Add --version flag, config file validation, DataBus.__bool__, cancellation handling, main.py tests. 263 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add CLI flags, config validation, DataBus.__bool__, cancellation handling
asi.improvements: --version/-V flag, config existence check before run, DataBus always truthy, asyncio.CancelledError handling in run_machine
asi.next_action_hint: Add graceful shutdown, REPL tests, processor queue configuration

description: Configurable queue size, processor repr, REPL tests, DataBus.__bool__. 281 tests all passing.

asi.hypothesis: Add configurable queue size, processor repr, comprehensive REPL tests
asi.improvements: Processor queue now configurable (default 1024 bounded), REPL test coverage, processor __repr__ for debugging

description: Concurrency tests, REPL tests, standalone flag fix, processor repr. 289 tests all passing.

asi.hypothesis: Add concurrency tests, REPL command tests, fix standalone flag handling
asi.improvements: Concurrent slot access tests, processor independence tests, REPL command coverage, standalone flag clarity
asi.bugs_fixed: standalone flag 'is not True' comparison was fragile

description: Full pipeline integration tests, error propagation tests, concurrent patterns, CLI standalone fix. 294 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add integration tests covering full hooks→events→processors→bus→frontend pipeline
asi.improvements: 5 integration tests covering lifecycle, errors, actions, multi-tool cycles, and frontend rendering
asi.next_action_hint: Improve error messages, add boundary tests, fix pyproject.toml classifiers

description: JSON serialization tests, boundary tests, fix history_limit=0 bug, Beta classifier. 311 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add serialization tests for IPC boundary, boundary condition tests, fix history_limit=0
asi.bugs_fixed: ToolProcessor history_limit=0 didn't truncate because list[-0:] returns full list
asi.finding: Python list[-0:] == list[0:] since -0 == 0, need explicit check for limit=0

description: Frontend rendering tests — change detection, content dedup, tool history, token rendering, Done once. 324 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add comprehensive frontend rendering tests
asi.improvements: 13 new tests covering change detection, content dedup, incremental tool rendering, error markers, token stats, Done-once guard, versions() pattern

description: Inspector error handling, advanced inspector tests, quality tests (docstrings, API consistency, version). 369 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Fix inspector FileNotFoundError, add quality tests for docstrings and API consistency
asi.bugs_fixed: inspect_machine/validate_machine/show_context crashed on nonexistent files instead of returning error message
asi.improvements: Quality tests verify module docstrings, class docstrings, API consistency, version format

description: Repr methods for all classes, repr tests, MachineInfo/Index/CLIBackend repr. 387 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add __repr__ to all major classes for debugging, comprehensive repr tests
asi.improvements: __repr__ on MachineInfo, MachineIndex, CLIBackend; 18 new repr tests verify debugging usefulness

description: Comprehensive error path tests — processor recovery, event edge cases, discovery errors, inspector YAML errors. 406 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add tests for all error recovery paths: processors, events, discovery, inspector
asi.improvements: 19 new error path tests covering exception recovery, malformed inputs, permission denied, binary files, invalid YAML

description: Advanced processor tests — custom processors, timing, token/tool/content/error edge cases. 423 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add advanced processor tests for custom processors, timing behavior, and all processor edge cases
asi.improvements: 17 new tests: custom processor lifecycle, Hz timing behavior, token accumulation, tool error tracking, content multiline, error limits

description: Package integrity tests, mypy config, README with test docs, pyproject metadata tests. 438 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add packaging tests, mypy config, comprehensive README
asi.improvements: 15 packaging tests (structure, metadata, exports, dependencies), mypy config, README test docs, test file guide

description: CHANGELOG, run_machine tests with mocks, lifecycle guarantee tests. 447 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add CHANGELOG, mock machine tests for run_machine lifecycle, backend guarantees
asi.improvements: CHANGELOG documenting all fixes/features, 9 run_machine tests with mocks covering success/error/cancel/complex results

description: Fix ToolProcessor parallel tool tracking bug (removed all matching instead of one), 6 parallel tool tests. 453 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Fix parallel tool active tracking: completing one tool of many with same name removed ALL instead of one
asi.bugs_fixed: ToolProcessor active list filter removed ALL tools matching by name, now removes only first match
asi.finding: When n parallel bash calls are active, completing one should leave n-1 active, not 0

description: Advanced bus tests — invariants, immutability docs, wait patterns, stress tests. 469 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add bus invariant tests, stress tests, SlotValue reference semantics documentation
asi.improvements: 16 new tests: monotonic version/timestamp, snapshot consistency, wait patterns, stress (50 slots × 100 writes, concurrent 20 writers)

description: Production readiness summary tests — 15 checks covering all production criteria. 484 total tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add comprehensive production readiness summary tests
asi.improvements: 15 summary tests: imports, semver, exports, py.typed, no bare excepts, docstrings, JSON serialization, slot names, event types, abstract frontend, changelog, readme, dev deps, reprs, logging

description: Advanced discovery tests — resolution, caching, symlinks, nested git. 503 tests, 0 failures!

asi.hypothesis: Add advanced discovery tests for resolution edge cases, caching, symlinks
asi.improvements: 19 new tests: ambiguous/unique prefix, file caching, directory resolve, discover sorting, tags/desc/agents/machines, symlinks, nested .git

description: Advanced hooks tests — emission ordering, context flow, tool provider lifecycle. 518 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add hooks emission ordering tests, context flow tests, tool provider lifecycle
asi.improvements: 15 new tests: full lifecycle event ordering, error ordering, context passthrough for all hooks, tool provider caching/errors

description: ActionHandler advanced tests — overwrite, mutation, chaining, fallback. 527 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add ActionHandler edge case tests for registration, context mutation, and chaining behavior
asi.improvements: 9 new tests: handler overwrite, context mutation/replacement, action name passing, chaining prevention, fallback chain, empty passthrough

description: Advanced frontend tests — reset lifecycle, human review edge cases, ANSI helpers, complex bus data. 538 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add frontend lifecycle reset tests, human review edge cases, rendering with complex bus data
asi.improvements: 11 new tests: state reset between runs, whitespace input, chain append, ANSI edge cases, all-slots rendering, unexpected data shapes

description: Advanced event tests — serialization, immutability, context references, type stability. 559 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add event serialization, immutability, context reference, and type stability tests
asi.improvements: 21 new tests: all events JSON-serializable, context not mutated, context shared by reference, type strings stable, constructor completeness

description: Pipeline stress tests — high throughput, large payloads, multi-cycle, error recovery. 566 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add pipeline stress tests for throughput, large payloads, and restart cycles
asi.improvements: 7 new tests: 50-state transitions, 30 rapid tool calls, all-5-processors under load, error recovery, 100KB output, large context, 3 restart cycles

description: Fix frontend tool history desync bug, add tool_call_id matching for parallel tools, REPL history persistence. 574 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Fix 3 production issues: frontend history desync, tool_call_id tracking, REPL history
asi.bugs_fixed: 1) Frontend _render_tools used history[last_count:] which returned [] when history truncated — now uses history[-num_new:]. 2) ToolProcessor active list now tracks tool_call_id and matches precisely for parallel tool removal.
asi.improvements: REPL command history saved to ~/.flatmachines_history via readline

description: Log dropped events, log shutdown errors, pretty-print dict results, remove unused signal import. 586 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Fix silent event drops, shutdown error logging, dict result formatting
asi.improvements: 1) Processor.enqueue logs DEBUG on queue-full drops. 2) Backend.stop logs WARNING for processor task errors. 3) ContentProcessor formats dict results as pretty JSON. 4) Removed unused signal import.
asi.bugs_fixed: ContentProcessor str(dict) produced unreadable repr output instead of JSON

description: Add CLI subcommands: list, inspect, validate. Full CLI coverage with tests. 594 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add list/inspect/validate as CLI subcommands (previously only available in REPL)
asi.improvements: CLI now supports 'flatmachines list', 'flatmachines inspect <path>', 'flatmachines validate <path>' as direct commands
asi.next_action_hint: Update README CLI docs, add more subcommand edge case tests

description: Update README CLI docs, CHANGELOG with all recent fixes and features. 594 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Update documentation to reflect all new CLI commands and fixes
asi.improvements: README now documents list/inspect/validate/--version CLI commands, CHANGELOG updated with all 12 bug fixes and 8 new features

description: Add context CLI subcommand, full CLI parity with REPL commands. 596 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add context subcommand for CLI parity with REPL
asi.improvements: All REPL inspection commands (list, inspect, validate, context) now available as direct CLI subcommands

description: DRY refactor: extract _resolve_machine_path helper, eliminate duplicated resolve logic. 597 tests.

asi.hypothesis: DRY refactor of duplicated machine resolution logic in CLI subcommands
asi.improvements: Extracted _resolve_machine_path helper used by inspect/validate/context commands. Reduced 50+ lines of duplicated code to single dispatch table.

description: Final coverage tests — slot edge cases, cost handling, file tracking, multi-writer, accepts validation. 613 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Cover remaining untested paths: slot read_if_changed, cost rounding, file tracking, accepts validation, multi-writer
asi.improvements: 16 new tests covering fine-grained edge cases discovered through code review

description: Graceful signal handling: _run_async wraps asyncio.run with KeyboardInterrupt → clean exit(130). 616 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add graceful SIGINT handling via _run_async wrapper
asi.improvements: All async CLI commands now use _run_async() which catches KeyboardInterrupt and exits with code 130 instead of printing ugly tracebacks

description: Add --log-level CLI flag (DEBUG/INFO/WARNING/ERROR), overrides LOG_LEVEL env var. 618 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add --log-level CLI flag for easier debugging in production
asi.improvements: --log-level DEBUG/INFO/WARNING/ERROR flag, overrides LOG_LEVEL env var, applies to all flatmachines loggers

description: Complete coverage tests — SlotValue, queue size, Hz-zero, protocol stability, tool summaries, processor order. 642 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Cover remaining untested paths: SlotValue dataclass, queue sizing, event key stability, tool summaries, processor ordering
asi.improvements: 24 new tests: SlotValue attributes, queue size defaults, zero Hz, protocol key stability, tool summarize edge cases, default processor ordering

description: Fix human_review blocking (run_in_executor), add processor backpressure stats (events_processed/dropped/queue_hwm). 660 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Fix _human_review event loop blocking + add processor queue monitoring stats
asi.improvements: _prompt_user uses run_in_executor when async loop is running; Processor.stats property tracks events_processed, events_dropped, queue_hwm; _safe_input extracted as module-level function
asi.fix: Also fixed __repr__ displacement bug caused by _safe_input insertion

description: Backend graceful shutdown timeout: force-cancel stuck processors after N seconds. 667 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add shutdown timeout to backend.stop() to prevent hangs from stuck processors
asi.improvements: stop(timeout=5.0) waits for processors then force-cancels stuck ones; added 7 tests for shutdown edge cases

description: Structured JSON logging (--log-format json), JSONFormatter with timestamps+exceptions. 675 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add structured JSON logging option for production log aggregation
asi.improvements: --log-format json flag, _JSONFormatter class with ISO timestamps and exception serialization, 8 new JSON logging tests

description: DataBus persistence: to_json/from_json/save/load for crash recovery. 691 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add DataBus serialization for crash recovery and state inspection
asi.improvements: to_json(), from_json(), save(), load() methods on DataBus; 16 new tests covering roundtrips, edge cases, nested data, file operations
